text: BLOCKCHAIN VS HEALTHCARE SYSTEMS: NEW ALTERNATIVE IN THE ERA OF DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION In order to solve the problem of interoperability, data protection and resource planning in digital transformation era, the emerging technology of Blockchain can be used in order to revolution health systems. This article aims to find out potential applications of Blockchain technology in the health care sector and how it could be used as a key for resolution of the current problems. Studies conducted according to PRISMA protocol, where 10 relevant studies that met the criteria for the application of Blockchain technology in the health care sector, were selected. Studies relating to the development and implementation of Blockchain technologies in the health sector have been mostly focused on the data encryption, health supply chain management and sharing data. This article will analyze in more detail the use of Blockchain technology in the health sector, as well as the opportunities and obstacles that they face.
